---
title: "All 81 Chapter Pages"
subtitle: "Complete source-anchored Tao Te Ching chapter layer"
listing:
  - id: all-chapters
    contents: "chapter-*.md"
    sort: "order"
    type: default
    fields: [title, description]
---

## Full Chapter Layer

This track contains individual pages for all `81` chapters of the Tao Te Ching.

Each page now combines:

- the full local source text for that chapter
- its category memberships inside the 12-part Omega map
- theorem-level Lean anchors for the strongest formal correspondences
- a short boundary note distinguishing formal correspondence from looser analogy

## Reading Strategy

The category essays remain the main interpretive layer. These `81` chapter pages move one level deeper: they let the reader inspect each short textual unit directly, with the Omega mapping attached at the chapter scale rather than only at the thematic-cluster scale.

:::{#all-chapters}
:::

---

[Back to Tao Te Ching Index](../index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../../index.qmd)
